block_06: IQ Option is thrilled to invite you to the first ever Labor Day Extravaganza Tournament 2023 for traders worldwide.
block_07: In honor of the hard work and sacrifices of laborers worldwide,the five-day trading competition will kick off on May 1st and will last till May 5th. Top 21 traders on the leaderboard will take their share from a prize pool of $5,000
